---
title: "Describe Sample - Novel GLP1s vs other classes"
author: "Gwen Aubrac"
format: html
embed-resources: true
---

## Overview

Create a table of baseline characteristics before weighting. Check the standardized mean differences (SMD) before weighting, after IPTW weighting, and after IPCW + IPCW weighting. 

```{r}
#| label: describe-sample
#### DESCRIBE SAMPLE ####

project_root <- Sys.getenv("PROJECT_ROOT")
if (nchar(project_root) == 0) stop("PROJECT_ROOT is not set. To run this file directly in an R session, source code/00-setup.R first in the same session (it loads .Renviron). Otherwise launch the full pipeline via run_all.R / run_all.command / run_all.bat.")
output_dir      <- Sys.getenv("OUTPUT_DIR",      unset = file.path(project_root, "output"))
main_output_dir <- Sys.getenv("MAIN_OUTPUT_DIR", unset = output_dir)
results_dir <- Sys.getenv("RESULTS_DIR", unset = file.path(project_root, "results", "main"))
is_main <- !nzchar(Sys.getenv("SCENARIO_NAME")) ||
  identical(Sys.getenv("SCENARIO_NAME"), "main")
out_path <- function(name) {
  p <- normalizePath(file.path(output_dir, name), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  if (file.exists(p)) return(p)
  normalizePath(file.path(main_output_dir, name), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(table1)
library(smd)

data     <- readRDS(out_path("data_novel.rds"))
data1    <- readRDS(out_path("data1_novel.rds"))
data2    <- readRDS(out_path("data2_novel.rds"))
data3    <- readRDS(out_path("data3_novel.rds"))
cov_list <- readRDS(out_path("cov_list_novel.rds"))

data1$trt <- factor(data1$trt, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("SGLT2 Inhibitors", "Novel GLP1 Agonists"))
data2$trt <- factor(data2$trt, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("DPP4 Inhibitors", "Novel GLP1 Agonists"))
data3$trt <- factor(data3$trt, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Sulfonylureas", "Novel GLP1 Agonists"))

# this function is to only show the rows for cov=1 (to simplify the table)
render_binary <- function(x, ...) {
  y <- table1::render.categorical.default(x, ...)
  if (length(levels(factor(x))) == 2) {
    y <- tail(y, 1)
    names(y) <- ""
  }
  y
}

# add formatted labels for covariates
labels <- c(
  age = "Age (years)",
  alcohol = "Alcohol use disorders",
  cancer = "Cancer",
  cvd = "Cardiovascular disease",
  ckd = "Chronic kidney disease",
  revas = "Coronary revascularization",
  ampu = "Diabetic amputation",
  retino = "Diabetic retinopathy",
  diab_neuro = "Diabetic neuropathy",
  hypoglyc = "Hypoglycemia",
  dyslipid = "Dyslipidemia",
  eskd = "End-stage kidney disease",
  hf = "Heart failure",
  hepa = "Hepatic disease",
  hyper = "Hypertension",
  ihd = "Ischemic heart disease",
  nafld = "Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease",
  pace = "Use of a pacemaker or defibrillator",
  pvd = "Perivascular disease",
  vhd = "Ventricular heart disease",
  edema = "Edema",
  copd = "COPD",
  apnea = "Sleep apnea",
  thyroid = "Thyroid disorders",
  depression = "Depression",
  anxiety = "Anxiety",
  hosp_cat = "Number of hospitalizations",
  emerg_cat = "Number of emergency service use",
  statin = "Statins",
  betablocker = "Betablockers",
  arb = "Angiotensin receptor inhibitors",
  thiazide = "Thiazides",
  ccb = "Calcium channel blockers",
  aceinhibitor = "ACE inhibitors",
  insulin = "Insulin",
  metformin = "Metformin",
  prop_b_q = "ZIP5-level quintile of proportion with a Bachelor's or higher",
  gender = "Male",
  year = "Initation year",
  bmi_cat = "BMI category",
  region = "Region",
  race = "Race and ethnicity",
  plan_type = "Insurance plan type"
)

# apply labels to the datasets
for (var in names(labels)) {
  label(data[[var]]) <- labels[[var]]
  label(data1[[var]]) <- labels[[var]]
  label(data2[[var]]) <- labels[[var]]
  label(data3[[var]]) <- labels[[var]]
}

# and define the order in which covariates will be listed in the table:
cov_list <- c(
  # Sociodemographic characteristics
  "age",
  "gender",
  "race",
  "region",
  "prop_b_q",
  "plan_type",
  "year",
  "bmi_cat",
  "hosp_cat",
  "emerg_cat",

  # Comorbidities (alphabetical by label)
  "alcohol",
  "anxiety",
  "cancer",
  "cvd",
  "ckd",
  "copd",
  "revas",
  "depression",
  "ampu",
  "diab_neuro",
  "retino",
  "dyslipid",
  "edema",
  "eskd",
  "hepa",
  "hf",
  "hypoglyc",
  "hyper",
  "ihd",
  "nafld",
  "pvd",
  "apnea",
  "thyroid",
  "pace",
  "vhd",

  # Concomitant medications
  "aceinhibitor",
  "arb",
  "betablocker",
  "ccb",
  "insulin",
  "metformin",
  "statin",
  "thiazide"
)


# make table 1 for entire sample (all med groups)
tab1_formula <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(cov_list, collapse = " + "), " | index_class"))

tab1_data <- table1(
  tab1_formula,
  data = data,
  overall = c(right = "Total"),
  caption = "Baseline Characteristics of All Patients",
  render.categorical = render_binary
)

tab1_data
write.table(tab1_data, file.path(results_dir, "tab1.csv"), col.names = T, row.names = F, append = F, sep = ",")

# table 1 for specific comparisons:
tab1_formula_new <- (tab1_formula <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(cov_list, collapse = " + "), " | trt")))

# novel GLP1s vs sglt2

# compute crude and weighted SMDs for each covariate
compute_smd <- function(var, data, weights = NULL) {
  round(smd(data[[var]], g = data$trt, w = weights)$estimate, 3)
}

crude_smd <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data1)
iptw_smd <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data1, weights = data1$iptw)

crude_smd_lookup <- setNames(abs(crude_smd), cov_list)
iptw_smd_lookup <- setNames(abs(iptw_smd),  cov_list)

tab1_data1 <- table1(
  tab1_formula_new,
  data = data1,
  overall = c(right = "Total"),
  caption = "Baseline Characteristics of Novel GLP1 vs SGLT2 Patients",
  render.categorical = render_binary,
  extra.col = list(
    "Crude SMD" = function(x, vname, ...) crude_smd_lookup[vname],
    "IPTW SMD" = function(x, vname, ...) iptw_smd_lookup[vname]
  )
)

tab1_data1
write.table(tab1_data1, file.path(results_dir, "tab1_data1.csv"), col.names = T, row.names = F, append = F, sep = ",")


library(tidysmd)

sink(file.path(results_dir, "smd_d1.txt"))

cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("STANDARDIZED MEAN DIFFERENCES\n")
cat("Generated on:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n\n", sep = "")

# Save the SMD output
smd_output <- tidy_smd(
  data1, 
  cov_list,
  .group = trt, 
  .wts = c(iptw, swfinal)
)

print(smd_output, n = 150)

cat("\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("END OF REPORT\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")

sink()

# novel GLP1 vs dpp4
rm(crude_smd, iptw_smd, crude_smd_lookup, iptw_smd_lookup)
gc()
crude_smd  <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data2)
iptw_smd   <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data2, weights = data2$iptw)

crude_smd_lookup <- setNames(abs(crude_smd), cov_list)
iptw_smd_lookup  <- setNames(abs(iptw_smd),  cov_list)

tab1_data2 <- table1(
  tab1_formula_new,
  data = data2,
  overall = c(right = "Total"),
  caption = "Baseline Characteristics of Novel GLP1 vs DPP4 Patients",
  render.categorical = render_binary,
  extra.col = list(
    "Crude SMD"  = function(x, vname, ...) crude_smd_lookup[vname],
    "IPTW SMD"   = function(x, vname, ...) iptw_smd_lookup[vname]
  )
)

tab1_data2
write.table(tab1_data2, file.path(results_dir, "tab1_data2.csv"), col.names = T, row.names = F, append = F, sep = ",")


sink(file.path(results_dir, "smd_d2.txt"))

cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("STANDARDIZED MEAN DIFFERENCES\n")
cat("Generated on:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n\n", sep = "")

# Save the SMD output
smd_output <- tidy_smd(
  data2, 
  cov_list,
  .group = trt, 
  .wts = c(iptw, swfinal)
)

print(smd_output, n = 150)

cat("\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("END OF REPORT\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")

sink()


# novel GLP1s vs sulfos
rm(crude_smd, iptw_smd, crude_smd_lookup, iptw_smd_lookup)
gc()
crude_smd  <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data3)
iptw_smd   <- sapply(cov_list, compute_smd, data = data3, weights = data3$iptw)

crude_smd_lookup <- setNames(abs(crude_smd), cov_list)
iptw_smd_lookup  <- setNames(abs(iptw_smd),  cov_list)

tab1_data3 <- table1(
  tab1_formula_new,
  data = data3,
  overall = c(right = "Total"),
  caption = "Baseline Characteristics of Novel GLP1 vs Sulfonylureas Patients",
  render.categorical = render_binary,
  extra.col = list(
    "Crude SMD"  = function(x, vname, ...) crude_smd_lookup[vname],
    "IPTW SMD"   = function(x, vname, ...) iptw_smd_lookup[vname]
  )
)

tab1_data3
write.table(tab1_data3, file.path(results_dir, "tab1_data3.csv"), col.names = T, row.names = F, append = F, sep = ",")

sink(file.path(results_dir, "smd_d3.txt"))

cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("STANDARDIZED MEAN DIFFERENCES\n")
cat("Generated on:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n\n", sep = "")

# Save the SMD output
smd_output <- tidy_smd(
  data3, 
  cov_list,
  .group = trt, 
  .wts = c(iptw, swfinal)
)

print(smd_output, n = 150)

cat("\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")
cat("END OF REPORT\n")
cat("=", rep("=", 70), "\n", sep = "")

sink()
```


### FINAL TABLE FOR THE MANUSCRIPT

```{r}
#| label: save-final-table1
#### SAVE FINAL TABLE 1 ####

tab1_data1_new <- as.data.frame(tab1_data1)
colnames(tab1_data1_new) <- c("var", "sglt2", "glp1", "total", "smd", "smd_iptw")

tab1_data2_new <- as.data.frame(tab1_data2)
colnames(tab1_data2_new) <- c("var", "dpp4", "glp1", "total", "smd", "smd_iptw")

tab1_data3_new <- as.data.frame(tab1_data3)
colnames(tab1_data3_new) <- c("var", "sulfo", "glp1", "total", "smd", "smd_iptw")

final_tab1 <- data.frame(
  var = tab1_data1_new$var,
  glp1 = tab1_data1_new$glp1, 
  sglt2 = tab1_data1_new$sglt2,
  smd_sglt2 = tab1_data1_new$smd_iptw,
  dpp4 = tab1_data2_new$dpp4,
  smd_dpp4 = tab1_data2_new$smd_iptw,
  sulfo = tab1_data3_new$sulfo,
  smd_sulfo = tab1_data3_new$smd_iptw
)

write.csv(
  final_tab1,
  file.path(results_dir, "final_tab1.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Manuscript table 1: only written on the main run; sensitivity scenarios
# skip this so they don't overwrite main's manuscript copy.
if (is_main) {
manuscript_tab_dir <- file.path(project_root, "manuscript", "tables")
dir.create(manuscript_tab_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

manuscript_tab1 <- final_tab1[, c("var", "sglt2", "smd_sglt2",
                                  "dpp4", "smd_dpp4",
                                  "sulfo", "smd_sulfo")]

# Title-case race/region category labels (source data has them in ALL CAPS).
title_targets <- c("WHITE","BLACK","ASIAN","HISPANIC","OTHER","MISSING",
                   "MIDWEST","NORTHEAST","SOUTH","WEST")
title_case <- function(s) paste0(toupper(substr(s,1,1)), tolower(substr(s,2,nchar(s))))
.var <- manuscript_tab1$var
.trim <- trimws(.var)
for (i in which(.trim %in% title_targets)) {
  lead <- sub("^([[:space:]]*).*$", "\\1", .var[i])
  .var[i] <- paste0(lead, title_case(.trim[i]))
}
manuscript_tab1$var <- .var

# Add thousands separators to integers with 4+ digits inside cells. Handles
# patterns like "12345" and "12345 (45%)" without touching decimals.
add_commas <- function(x) {
  vapply(x, function(s) {
    if (is.na(s)) return(s)
    m <- gregexpr("(?<![.\\d])\\d{4,}(?!\\d)", s, perl = TRUE)[[1]]
    if (m[1] == -1L) return(s)
    starts <- as.integer(m); lens <- attr(m, "match.length")
    for (j in rev(seq_along(starts))) {
      num <- as.integer(substr(s, starts[j], starts[j] + lens[j] - 1L))
      s <- paste0(substr(s, 1L, starts[j] - 1L),
                  formatC(num, big.mark = ",", format = "d"),
                  substr(s, starts[j] + lens[j], nchar(s)))
    }
    s
  }, character(1), USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}
manuscript_tab1[] <- lapply(manuscript_tab1, add_commas)

# Footnote marker on "Age (years)" row (footnote b).
age_rows <- grepl("^[[:space:]]*Age \\(years\\)\\s*$", manuscript_tab1$var)
manuscript_tab1$var[age_rows] <- sub("(Age \\(years\\))", "\\1 b",
                                     manuscript_tab1$var[age_rows])

# Footnote marker on each "IPTW SMD" header (footnote a).
colnames(manuscript_tab1) <- c("Variable",
                                "SGLT2 Inhibitors", "IPTW SMD a",
                                "DPP4 Inhibitors",  "IPTW SMD a",
                                "Sulfonylureas",    "IPTW SMD a")

# Append footnote rows at the bottom of the table.
# Build footnotes positionally so the duplicate "IPTW SMD a" column names
# don't get collapsed by setdiff() (which would leave the data frame with
# fewer columns than manuscript_tab1 and break rbind).
footnotes <- as.data.frame(
  matrix("", nrow = 2, ncol = ncol(manuscript_tab1)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
colnames(footnotes) <- colnames(manuscript_tab1)
footnotes[, 1] <- c(
  "a. Differences between GLP-1 agonists and the comparator medication on the left.",
  "b. For privacy reasons, age is top-coded at 89 years. Patients aged 89 and above are represented as age 89."
)
manuscript_tab1 <- rbind(manuscript_tab1, footnotes)

write.table(manuscript_tab1,
            file.path(manuscript_tab_dir, "table-1-patient-char.csv"),
            sep = ",", row.names = FALSE, col.names = TRUE, qmethod = "double")
}  # /is_main
```
